reviews.school_name: Darbari Lal Foundation World School - Sakipur,Zeta I

school_address.streetAddress: HS-31, Sector 130m Rd, opposite Paramount Golf Foreste, Sakipur, Zeta I, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201308, India

reviews.author: Sudeep Ghosh
reviews.review_body:
They abuse students. If students can't write, they tell the students to slap themselves.

Section 17 under the Right to Education Act 2009 completely bars corporal punishment on children, and the sentence under Section 75 of the Juvenile Justice Act would be rigorous imprisonment of up to five years and a fine of up to Rs 5 lakh.

I am going to take the teacher to court for this.

reviews.school_name: Darbari Lal Foundation World School - Sakipur,Zeta I
reviews.author: Neha Bargoti
reviews.review_body: Worst experience ever.This is not a school at all rather than an organisation to make money and let parents and children go to hell. Their internal issue never gonna end as principal and teachers get changed frequently they even don't know what is SR register having zero work quality this school is zero with everything.

reviews.school_name: Darbari Lal Foundation World School - Sakipur,Zeta I
reviews.author: Arun Naiyar
reviews.review_body: This is not a school at all rather an organisation to mint money and let parents and children go to hell. There is no focus on study forget about sports and overall development. There is hardly any staff in this organisation and management is 0. Teachers are not even qualified to do what they are doing and are rude to parents and biased to kids that pay them extra (thats what I believe). Warning anyone who has been thinking about this joke for their kids admission as you will end up spoiling your kids future and wasting money and year.

reviews.school_name: Darbari Lal Foundation World School - Sakipur,Zeta I
reviews.author: Charul Agarwal
reviews.review_body: It is a wonderful experience with DLF school,teaching methods are superb, my son is really very improving  nd growing as a smart nd creative kid. Greet sessions are also  very  nice. I am happy with the school.

reviews.school_name: Darbari Lal Foundation World School - Sakipur,Zeta I
reviews.author: Neelam Tripathi
reviews.review_body:
It's a wonderful school for children which allows children to be their own self.
The comprehensive studies blended with technology and the detailed assessments keep the children prepared for the competitions.
The teachers are also very loving and caring.
